subject: Re: Farkas- Kokomo
body:
i'm on the island,,  call 340 775 8111
--- Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com> wrote:

> ---------- Forwarded message ----------
> From: Farkas, Andrew <afarkas@islecap.com>
> Date: Mar 24, 2006 8:39 PM
> Subject: Kokomo
> To: cecilia.steen@gmail.com
> 
> When you receive this I will have landed at jfk back
> from dxb. I am in nyc
> for one night and then head to St. Thomas sat am. As
> you know, I have to
> attend the St. Thomas chamber of commerce dinner
> with your friends chuck and
> eddie on saturday night. Sunday I'm off to sxm to
> board the boat and then a
> tour around the carib facilities.
> 
> DXB was quite successful. Igy has reached agreements
> with the gov't of oman
> with regards to the only marina in oman (muskat). We
> take over in 4 weeks.
> Also, we have reached an agreement in principal with
> the developers of both
> dubai fesitval city and qatar pearl to complete the
> design, engineering and
> development of all of their marina facilities
> associated with those mega
> projects. All in all, very good news.
> 
> If you are going to be on fantasy island during the
> next week perhaps we can
> have lunch and catch up. I will have my kids, sandi,
> brother, et al with me,
> but they do not have to come. Let me know if you'd
> like to see my sun-shiney
> face.
> 
> ALF
> --------------------------
> Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld
>

body_html:
i'm on the island,, call 340 775 8111
--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Farkas, Andrew afarkas@islecap.com
Date: Mar 24, 2006 8:39 PM
Subject: Kokomo
To: cecilia.steen@gmail.com

When you receive this I will have landed at jfk back
from dxb. I am in nyc
for one night and then head to St. Thomas sat am. As
you know, I have to
attend the St. Thomas chamber of commerce dinner
with your friends chuck and
eddie on saturday night. Sunday I'm off to sxm to
board the boat and then a
tour around the carib facilities.

DXB was quite successful. Igy has reached agreements
with the gov't of oman
with regards to the only marina in oman (muskat). We
take over in 4 weeks.
Also, we have reached an agreement in principal with
the developers of both
dubai fesitval city and qatar pearl to complete the
design, engineering and
development of all of their marina facilities
associated with those mega
projects. All in all, very good news.

If you are going to be on fantasy island during the
next week perhaps we can
have lunch and catch up. I will have my kids, sandi,
brother, et al with me,
but they do not have to come. Let me know if you'd
like to see my sun-shiney
face.

ALF

Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld
